name: backend_fresher
description: Backend Java fresher in India — tests entry-level retrieval and ranking

jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a backend engineer to join our core platform team. You will build scalable microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL. Work with Docker and Kubernetes for deployment. Ideal for engineers with 0-2 years of experience who want to grow in a product-first environment.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (Backend)
jobs.description: Join Razorpay's payments platform team. Develop and maintain high-scale payment systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Redis. Work on microservices architecture handling millions of transactions. 0-2 years experience required. Bangalore location.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Postman is looking for a backend developer to work on our API platform. You'll use Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL to build features used by millions. Remote-friendly team. 0-2 years experience welcome.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Build the next generation of credit management products. Work with Java, Spring Boot, and Kafka. Design and implement RESTful microservices. 0-2 years experience. Bangalore.

jobs.title: Software Engineer I
jobs.description: Join JPMorgan's India development centre as a Software Engineer I. Work on Java, Spring Boot, and cloud-native applications for global banking systems. Training and mentorship provided. 0-2 years experience.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (Java)
jobs.description: Freshworks is hiring a Java software engineer for our SaaS platform. Work on Spring Boot microservices, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL. Fresh graduate friendly with strong mentorship culture. Chennai.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - New Analyst
jobs.description: Goldman Sachs' engineering division is hiring new analysts. Build scalable systems using Java, Python, and Spring Boot. Work on trading platforms and risk management systems. Campus hiring for 2026 graduates.

jobs.title: Systems Engineer
jobs.description: TCS is hiring systems engineers for various client projects. Work on Java, Spring Boot, and SQL-based applications. Training provided for fresh graduates. Pan India locations.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Lead our content marketing strategy. Create campaigns, manage social media, and drive brand awareness. 5+ years experience required in B2B SaaS marketing.

jobs.title: Sales Executive
jobs.description: Drive Razorpay's enterprise sales pipeline. Build relationships with key accounts. 3+ years in fintech sales required. MBA preferred.

jobs.title: Finance Analyst
jobs.description: Join JPMorgan's corporate finance team. Financial modeling, reporting, and analysis. CA/CFA preferred. 0-2 years experience.

jobs.title: HR Business Partner
jobs.description: Partner with engineering teams on talent strategy, performance management, and organizational design. 5+ years HR experience.

jobs.title: Legal Counsel
jobs.description: Provide legal guidance on fintech regulations, contracts, and compliance. LLB required. 3+ years experience in fintech or banking legal.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Design intuitive API experiences. Work on UX for Postman's desktop and web applications. Figma, design systems, and user research experience required.
